name: Gullible
description:
Pigeon Pigeon is a hilarious bluff game, simple and strategic!

Make other players believe anything! Make up hilarious lies! Discover incredible but true stories!

Two teams challenge each other by asking unusual questions. Example: What was the name of Jacques Chirac's dog at the Paris town hall?

When one team questions the other, they try to trick the other by presenting them with 3 choices of answer:


     the real answer,
     2 false answers she just made up!


The opposing team must bet their chips on the answer they think is true... The chips bet on the right answer are kept! The others are lost! The first team to run out of chips loses the game!
